title: hoita glandulosa
intro: Hoita glandulosa, also known as Hoita, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of the Himalayas. Traditionally, Hoita glandulosa has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Hoita glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various ailments and promote overall well-being.
